See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96650 => 'STC', 966510 => 'Salam', 966511 => 'Salam', 9665153 => 'STC', 9665154 => 'STC', 96653 => 'STC', 96654 => 'Mobily', 96655 => 'STC', 96656 => 'Mobily', 966570 => 'Virgin', 966571 => 'Virgin', 966572 => 'Virgin', 966573 => 'Virgin', 966574 => 'Red Bull Mobile', 966575 => 'Red Bull Mobile', 966576 => 'Lebara', 966577 => 'Lebara', 966578 => 'Lebara', 966579 => 'Mobily', 96658 => 'Zain', 96659 => 'Zain', ];
